docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, JOSE GONZALEZ, BERTA ALVAREZ, JUANA AS TO DEFENDANT VALLI, SWAMY DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-03-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-03-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-14-1994
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-03-1994, CONTINUED TO MAY-02-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-02-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-02-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING, AND WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND FAILURE TO COMPLY. HEARING SET FOR JUN-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
